reason: Browser use feature test: agent successfully opened browser, navigated to example.com, and returned page title "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded with SuperAgent dashboard showing three agents in sidebar
Found and clicked on agent "QA-20260502-174722-evw0" in the main area — Agent configuration page opened with message input field ready
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in input textbox — Message text entered correctly in active input field
Clicked "Send message" button — Message sent successfully, agent status changed to "working" with timer starting at 0s
Waited up to 3 minutes for response mentioning "Example Domain" — Response arrived within 7 seconds showing "The page title is "Example Domain""

Took screenshot showing the complete response — Final screenshot captured showing agent response with browser tool calls (Open Browser and Browser Command), the retrieved page title, browser preview panel on right side with "Example Domain" tab, and activity log of executed commands
